title: Ruling keeps Helen Hudson, former Syracuse council president, on Dem primary ballot
summary: A court ruling has secured Helen Hudson's ballot position for the June 2026 Democratic primary in Syracuse's at-large Common Council race. This procedural decision ensures competitive participation in the party nomination process.

political_signal.description: Electoral process maintaining competitive primary participation; procedural integrity in ballot access decisions

processing_notes: Article focuses on electoral procedure rather than municipal operations or CIO initiatives
